content.json:
# ArcRemediator fleet view

One row per host per day from the `ArcRemediation_CL` table.  Filter by `CloudProfile` to view Commercial vs AzureGovernmentDoD independently. **Commercial validation does not qualify DoD/IL5.**

## 1. Silent servers (no row in the last 36 hours)

Hosts known to the workspace but missing recent rows.  Daily run + 0-60 min random delay should hit every 24 hours; >36h means the scheduled task did not write a row.  Common causes: scheduled task disabled, module crashed pre-config-load, Monitor token failure with no local recovery.

content.query:
let recent = ArcRemediation_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Hostname, CloudProfile;
recent
| where LastSeen < ago(36h)
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| project Hostname, CloudProfile, LastSeen, HoursSilent = round((now() - LastSeen) / 1h, 1)
| sort by HoursSilent desc

content.json:
## 2. Outcomes by cloud profile (last `{TimeRange}`)

Distribution of `Outcome` values per `CloudProfile`.  Commercial and DoD should be tracked independently.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize Count = count() by CloudProfile, Outcome
| sort by CloudProfile asc, Count desc

content.json:
## 3. ConnectivityBlocked / NeedsHuman

Hosts whose Disconnected diagnosis was not auto-recoverable.  Operator review required.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Outcome in ("ConnectivityBlocked", "NeedsHuman")
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Occurrences = count(), LastDetail = arg_max(TimeGenerated, OutcomeDetail).OutcomeDetail by Hostname, CloudProfile, Outcome
| sort by LastSeen desc

content.json:
## 4. ResourceNotFound

ARM GET returned 404.  The remediator NEVER auto-recreates; every row here needs an operator decision (see `docs/ops-runbook.md` section 7.4).

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Outcome == "ResourceNotFound"
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Occurrences = count(), SampleResourceId = any(AzureResourceId) by Hostname, CloudProfile
| sort by LastSeen desc

content.json:
## 5. ARM error trio (Forbidden / Throttled / TransientFailure)

Three distinct ARM-side failure modes.  `ArmForbidden` typically means RBAC drift (the Arc SP lost its role assignment).  `ArmThrottled` means fleet activity exceeded subscription-level limits.  `ArmTransientFailure` is the catch-all for 5xx and network errors.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Outcome in ("ArmForbidden", "ArmThrottled", "ArmTransientFailure")
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize Occurrences = count() by CloudProfile, Outcome, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc

ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Outcome in ("ArmForbidden", "ArmThrottled", "ArmTransientFailure")
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), Occurrences = count(), LastDetail = arg_max(TimeGenerated, OutcomeDetail).OutcomeDetail by Hostname, CloudProfile, Outcome
| sort by Occurrences desc, LastSeen desc

content.json:
## 6. Expired rejoin attempts

Destructive Expired-rejoin attempts in the window.  Each `ExpiredRejoinSuccess` is one machine recreated; each `ExpiredRejoinFailure` is a cooldown-locked host that needs operator review.  `CooldownSkipped` means a previous attempt is still inside the 7-day window.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Outcome in ("ExpiredRejoinSuccess", "ExpiredRejoinFailure", "CooldownSkipped")
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| project TimeGenerated, Hostname, CloudProfile, Outcome, OutcomeDetail, AzureResourceId, RunDurationMs
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.json:
## 7. Tripped breakers

Hosts currently reporting `BreakerTripped == true` in their most recent run.  Reset via `Reset-ArcRemediator` on the host after the root cause is resolved.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Hostname
| where BreakerTripped == true
| project Hostname, CloudProfile, LastRun = TimeGenerated, ConsecutiveFailures, Outcome, OutcomeDetail, ResetByUser
| sort by LastRun desc

content.json:
## 8. Agent version drift

Hosts whose `AgentVersion` falls below the configured supported floor recorded in `ProbeAgentVersion`.  Use to plan agent upgrade waves.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Hostname
| extend ProbeStatus = tostring(ProbeAgentVersion.Status)
| extend MeetsFloor = tobool(ProbeAgentVersion.MeetsFloor)
| extend SupportedFloor = tostring(ProbeAgentVersion.SupportedFloor)
| where ProbeStatus == "Below"
| project Hostname, CloudProfile, AgentVersion, SupportedFloor, MeetsFloor, ProbeStatus, LastRun = TimeGenerated
| sort by Hostname asc

content.json:
## 9. Observe-mode hosts

Hosts still pinned to Observe in their most recent run.  These will not auto-remediate Disconnected services or Expired states.  Plan Phase 10 lab matrix completion before promoting to Enforce.

content.query:
ArcRemediation_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| where iff("{CloudProfile}" == "All", true, CloudProfile == "{CloudProfile}")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Hostname
| where ScriptMode == "Observe"
| project Hostname, CloudProfile, ScriptMode, AzureSideState, Outcome, LastRun = TimeGenerated
| sort by CloudProfile asc, Hostname asc
